headline: Gartner Survey Finds Consumers Want AI Shopping Help, But Not AI Purchase Decisions
summary: STAMFORD, Conn., May 27, 2026--As brands race to invest in agentic commerce, consumer willingness to let AI make purchase decisions topped out at 11% across lower-stakes categories, such as personal care and household supplies, according to Gartner, Inc., a business and technology insights company.

headline: TrendAI™ is recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Endpoint Protection Platforms
summary: TrendAI™, the enterprise cybersecurity business from Trend Micro Incorporated (TYO: 4704; TSE: 4704), has announced that it has been recognized 21 consecutive times as a Leader in Endpoint Protection Platforms* by Gartner. No other vendor has been named a Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader for 21 times in this category.

headline: The Asymmetric AI Winner: Cybersecurity ETFs Gaining From Cloud Buildout
summary: Cybersecurity ETFs are gaining traction as AI-driven cloud expansion fuels demand for digital protection and risk management.
